def negative_missing_context_manager():
    rule_id = "missing_context_manager"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Resource management (files, network connections) inside non-test Python functions that omits with-statement context managers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
